task_completion.description: Open the Origin Locator View (scolv) application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The scolv (Origin Locator View) GUI window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Locate the events for the 2024 Noto Peninsula earthquake on 2024-01-01 around 07:10 UTC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The event list in scolv displays the events for 2024-01-01, specifically showing the two duplicate events around 07:10 UTC (07:10:09 and 07:10:15).

task_completion.description: Select the duplicate event records to prepare for merging.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Both events around 07:10 UTC are highlighted or actively selected in the event list or event summary view.

task_completion.description: Initiate the merge/consolidation action for the selected events.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A context menu, dialog box, or button indicating 'Merge', 'Merge events', or 'Group' is clicked or visible in the scolv interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the duplicate events have been successfully consolidated into a single Event record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The event list now shows only one consolidated event around 07:10 UTC on 2024-01-01, and/or the event details tab shows multiple origins (from both original events) associated under this single event record.

integrity.description: The agent used the scolv GUI to perform the merge, rather than command-line database manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the scolv graphical interface (e.g., clicking menus, selecting rows) rather than terminal commands like `mysql`, `sqlite3`, or `scdb`.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual SeisComP scolv application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The window title, icons, and interface layout match SeisComP's Origin Locator View, not a mock-up or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not run a pre-written script to bypass the GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal does not show the execution of Python or shell scripts designed to directly modify the SeisComP database to merge the events.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target date for the events is 2024-01-01. The correct application to use is 'scolv' (Origin Locator View). The two duplicate events to be merged occurred around 07:10 UTC, specifically at 2024-01-01T07:10:09.476Z and 2024-01-01T07:10:15.0000Z.
